speaker: speaker1
text: Believe it or not , tea is the most popular beverage in the world after water .

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , people from Asia to Europe all enjoy tea .

speaker: speaker1
text: Right . And China is the homeland of tea .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , Chinese people love drinking tea so much . Some even claim they can't live without tea .

speaker: speaker1
text: Do you know there are several catagories of Chinese tea ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , I believe there are green teas , black teas and scented teas . Any Others ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , have you ever heard of Oulong tea and compressed tea ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , yeah . Oulong tea is good for one's health . isn't it ?

speaker: speaker1
text: You surely know a lot about Chinese tea .

speaker: speaker2
text: Sure , I like drinking tea at teahouses .

speaker: speaker2
text: Why don't we go for one now ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Great . We can chat while enjoying a cup there .
